name: SUBCLAVIAN STEAL SYNDROME
definition: stenosis / obstruction of subclavian artery near its origin with flow reversal in ipsilateral retrograde flow in systole + antegrade flow in diastole reverse flow seen only after provocative maneuvers, ie, ipsilateral arm exercise of 5 min /

demographics.Associated with: additional lesions of extracranial arteries in 81%

dominant_finding: reversal of vertebral artery flow → augmented by arm exercise / reactive hyperemia (=
discriminating_features: reversal of vertebral artery flow → augmented by arm exercise / reactive hyperemia (=
reversal of vertebral artery flow (selective injection of contralateral subclavian / vertebral
